query:
SELECT
                m.id,
                m.channel_id,
                m.sender_id,
                m.content,
                m.created_at,
                m.updated_at,
                m.edited_at::timestamptz AS "edited_at?",
                m.deleted_at::timestamptz AS "deleted_at?"
            FROM comms_messages m
            WHERE m.id = COALESCE(
                (SELECT thread_id FROM comms_messages WHERE id = $1 AND channel_id = $2),
                $1
            )
            AND m.channel_id = $2
            AND m.thread_id IS NULL
